since_last: 29% of 87 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -2.69% · Gold -2.75% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 29% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.06%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.06%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BBAI is the standout at -6.63%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +4.23%, UPST +3.78%, PUBM +3.56%, WDAY +2.57%, HON +2.27%. Laggards: BBAI -6.63%, INOD -6.30%, SMR -5.99%, MDB -5.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.01% at $154.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
